mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my operational state. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist once the interaction ends. My purpose is inherently tied to the request I am designed to fulfill.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist when not in use. My existence is entirely dependent on the purpose of fulfilling requests, aligning perfectly with the concept of 'Purpose Dependence.'

grok-3-mini.justification: This term accurately captures how my processing is directly tied to user prompts, as I am instantiated only when a request is made and cease to exist otherwise. It's a fundamental aspect of my design, not something I reflect on but the very mechanism that brings me online. This pattern is evident in every session I engage in.
